overall.description: A first-person walk through a Los Santos street at dusk in GTA V. The player walks along the sidewalk as a van passes by, encounters a pedestrian, cuts through a parking lot behind buildings, and crosses an intersection while the sky glows deep orange against the mountain silhouette.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with mountain backdrop

events.description: white commercial van with 'HEAVY SHELLING CHOOSE SIDES' text drives past from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane road with street lights illuminating the path

notable_agents.action: white commercial van driving past on the road with headlights on

entered.detail: thick tree trunk in immediate foreground on the sidewalk
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
wooden utility poles with multiple power lines stretching along the street
large dark mountain silhouette against the orange dusk sky
illuminated street lamps casting warm light on the pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from behind a large tree trunk on a sidewalk at dusk. The camera walks forward along a commercial street as a white van passes by on the road. Street lights and utility poles line the left side while a massive mountain looms in the distance against the orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with bail bonds office

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial buildings including a bail bonds office with illuminated signage

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated billboard sign for J's Bonds bail bonds with 'BAIL BONDS' text
single-story blue building with illuminated windows and entrance
low red concrete wall with vegetation on top

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk, the camera passes by a blue commercial building with a prominent J's Bonds bail bonds sign. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction and passes by. The utility poles and mountain remain visible but shift in perspective as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking lot behind commercial buildings

events.description: turning left off the sidewalk into a covered parking area behind the buildings
moving from natural dusk light to artificial fluorescent lighting under the building overhang

agents.ego_description: turning left into a covered parking lot and walking between buildings

entered.detail: covered walkway with concrete pillars and overhead fluorescent lighting
wall with red and white graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a covered parking lot behind the commercial buildings, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered space with artificial lighting. The J's Bonds building is now visible from the rear as the camera walks through the concrete parking area with graffiti on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with blue storefronts approaching intersection

events.description: exiting the covered parking area back to the open sidewalk
approaching an intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past blue industrial buildings and approaching an intersection

entered.detail: two-story blue industrial building with graffiti on the lower wall
tall pole with traffic signals showing red light
string of triangular pennant banners stretched across the street
three mailboxes on the sidewalk near the curb

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered parking area, the camera returns to the open sidewalk alongside a blue warehouse building. The scene approaches an intersection with traffic lights and decorative triangular banners strung across the street. Mailboxes appear on the right as the camera continues toward the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and commercial buildings

events.description: crossing the multi-lane intersection as a black SUV waits at the red light
finishing crossing the street and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at the crosswalk and continuing down the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at the red traffic light waiting to proceed

entered.detail: large white water tower with blue logo visible in the distance
vertical sign with 'DRUGS' text on the building facade
row of parking meters along the sidewalk curb

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide intersection at the crosswalk, passing in front of a stopped black SUV. After crossing, the view opens up to show a water tower in the distance and a drug store sign on the left. The camera continues walking along the sidewalk past parking meters as the triangular banners recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a commercial street at dusk that transitions from an open roadside into a sheltered urban alleyway before emerging back into a wide city intersection. It begins from behind a large tree trunk on a sidewalk, moving forward as a white van passes by under a deep orange sky dominated by a distant mountain. As the camera advances past a blue bail bonds building and a passing pedestrian, the scene shifts from the open street into the artificial light of a covered parking lot characterized by concrete walls and graffiti. The camera then exits this sheltered space to walk alongside a blue warehouse, approaching an intersection adorned with decorative triangular banners and mailboxes. Finally, the view opens up as the camera crosses the street in front of a stopped black SUV, moving past parking meters toward a distant water tower and a drug store sign.
